Member.title: Member
Member.description: Represents a member of the TransConnect platform.

id.description: Unique identifier for the Member entity.

firstName.description: The first name of the member.

lastName.description: The last name of the member.

email.description: The email address of the member.

phone.description: The phone number of the member.

companyName.description: The registered business name of the member's transport business.

membershipId.description: Reference to Membership tier ID (e.g., 'professional'). (Relationship: Member 1:1 Membership)

rewardPoints.description: The number of reward points accumulated by the member.

financeApplicationIds.description: A list of IDs for finance applications submitted by this member.

Membership.title: Membership
Membership.description: Represents a single tier of membership plan for the TransConnect platform (e.g., Member, Professional, Enterprise).

id.description: Unique identifier for the Membership tier (e.g., 'professional').

name.description: Display name of the membership plan (e.g., Professional).

description.description: A short description of the ideal user for this plan.

price.description: Monthly price of the membership plan in ZAR. A value of 0 indicates a free plan. A null or undefined value indicates custom pricing.

features.description: A list of features included in this plan.

Contribution.title: Contribution
Contribution.description: Represents a single data contribution from a member.

userId.description: The UID of the contributing member.

data.description: The submitted data, which varies based on the contribution type.

createdAt.description: The server timestamp when the contribution was made.

FinanceApplication.title: Finance Application
FinanceApplication.description: Represents a finance application submitted by a member through the Finance Mall.

applicantId.description: The UID of the member submitting the application.

status.description: The current status of the application.

amountRequested.description: The amount of funding requested in ZAR.

financials.description: Financial information, such as turnover and profit.

documents.description: A list of URIs pointing to uploaded supporting documents in cloud storage.

createdAt.description: The server timestamp when the application was submitted.

updatedAt.description: The server timestamp when the application was last updated.

definition.description: Stores member profiles. Access is restricted to the authenticated user (path-based ownership).

params.name: memberId
params.description: The unique identifier of the member, matching the Firebase Auth UID.

definition.description: Stores details of available membership plans (tiers), readable by all authenticated users.

params.name: membershipId
params.description: The unique identifier of the membership plan (e.g. 'professional').

definition.description: Stores anonymous data contributed by members across different categories (fleet, suppliers, etc.). Writable by any authenticated user, readable by admins.

params.name: contributionId
params.description: The unique identifier of the contribution document.

definition.description: Stores finance applications submitted by members. Writable by the applicant, readable by admins and matched financiers.

params.name: applicationId
params.description: The unique identifier of the finance application.

firestore.reasoning:
This Firestore data structure is designed to support the TransConnect platform, focusing on membership management and providing a foundation for future divisions. The structure emphasizes authorization independence, clarity, and scalability.

**Authorization Independence and QAPs:**

*   **Members:** Member data is stored under the `/members/{memberId}` path.  Access is restricted to the authenticated user (path-based ownership). The `members` collection supports secure `list` operations because each document's access control is self-contained within the path and authentication context.
*   **Memberships:** Membership plans are stored in the `/memberships/{membershipId}` collection.  These are global and are read-only for all authenticated users. Secure `list` operations are enabled because there are no authorization dependencies on other collections.

**Explanation of Structure and Design Choices:**

*   **/members/{memberId}**: This collection stores individual member profiles. Using the user's UID as the document ID ensures that only the authenticated user can access their own profile data, providing strong path-based ownership. It also now includes a `financeApplicationIds` array to securely link a member to their financial transactions without requiring insecure collection queries.
*   **/memberships/{membershipId}**: Stores the details of each membership plan. This collection can be accessed by all authenticated users to view available plans. No write access is granted to standard users.
*   **/contributions/{contributionId}**: This unified collection will store all data submitted through the Contribution Hub. A `type` field within each document will differentiate between fleet data, supplier data, etc. Any authenticated user can create (contribute) data. To maintain security and control, only administrators will have read (list) access to view all contributions in the backend portal. This prevents members from seeing each other's raw data submissions. The `contributionId` will be auto-generated by Firestore, ensuring each submission is unique.
*   **/financeApplications/{applicationId}**: This new collection will store all applications submitted through the Finance Mall. An applicant can create and update their own application. Only administrators (and eventually, matched financiers) will have read access. This ensures the sensitive financial data within an application is kept private and secure.

This structure provides a solid foundation for the TransConnect platform, adhering to the principles of authorization independence, clarity, and scalability. It supports secure `list` operations and enables robust security rules.
